papers.title: Rht24b, an ancient variation of TaGA2ox-A9, reduces plant height without yield penalty in wheat
papers.authors: Tian X, Xia X, Xu D, Liu Y, Xie L, Hassan MA, Song J, Li F, Wang D, Zhang Y, Hao Y, Li G, Chu C, He Z, Cao S

papers.title: Rht18 Semidwarfism in Wheat Is Due to Increased GA 2-oxidaseA9 Expression and Reduced GA Content
papers.authors: Ford BA, Foo E, Sharwood R, Karafiatova M, Vrana J, MacMillan C, Nichols DS, Steuernagel B, Uauy C, Doležel J, Chandler PM, Spielmeyer W

papers.title: Overgrowth mutants determine the causal role of gibberellin GA2oxidaseA13 in Rht12 dwarfism of wheat
papers.authors: Buss W, Ford BA, Foo E, Spielmeyer W

edges.mechanism: GA 2-oxidase catabolises bioactive GA1/GA4 and their precursors to inactive metabolites (GA12→GA110 conversion); depletes bioactive GA pool
edges.evidence_sentence: increased expression of GA2oxA9 in Rht18 results in a reduction of both bioactive GA content and plant height

edges.mechanism: Increased TaGA2ox expression depletes bioactive GA, reduces stem elongation; mechanism shared by Rht12, Rht14, Rht18, Rht24
edges.evidence_sentence: Rht12, Rht18, and Rht14 share the same height-reducing mechanism

edges.mechanism: Rht24b allele contains TaGA2ox-A9 with ancient variation that confers higher expression in stem tissue
edges.evidence_sentence: Rht24b conferred higher expression of TaGA2ox-A9 in stems, leading to a reduction of bioactive GA in stems but an elevation in leaves

edges.mechanism: Rht12 locus contains TaGA2oxA13 on chromosome 5A with elevated expression; overgrowth suppressors carry loss-of-function TaGA2oxA13 mutations
edges.evidence_sentence: tall overgrowth individuals contain loss-of-function mutations in GA2oxidaseA13

edges.mechanism: Rht18 allele drives increased TaGA2ox-A9 expression
edges.evidence_sentence: Rht18 showed higher expression of GA2oxA9 and lower GA content compared with its tall parent

edges.mechanism: Rht24b reduces plant height without yield penalty; increases NUE and photosynthesis
edges.evidence_sentence: Rht24b reduced plant height, but had no yield penalty; it significantly increased nitrogen use efficiency, photosynthetic rate and the expression of related genes

edges.mechanism: Rht18 dominant GA-responsive dwarfing via elevated TaGA2ox-A9; distinct from GA-insensitive Rht-B1/D1
edges.evidence_sentence: Rht18, a dominant and gibberellin (GA) responsive mutant, is genetically and functionally distinct from the widely used GA-insensitive semidwarfing genes

edges.mechanism: Rht12b dominant GA-responsive dwarf via TaGA2oxA13 5AL
edges.evidence_sentence: GA 2-oxidase gene was identified in the Rht12 region on chromosome 5A

edges.mechanism: Rht14 allelic with Rht18; same TaGA2ox-A9 upregulation mechanism
edges.evidence_sentence: Rht12, Rht18, and Rht14 share the same height-reducing mechanism

perturbations.evidence_sentence: Rht24b reduced plant height, but had no yield penalty
perturbations.notes: GA-responsive allele; 5-10% height reduction; NUE and photosynthesis increased

perturbations.evidence_sentence: Rht18 semidwarfism is due to increased GA 2-oxidaseA9 expression and reduced GA content
perturbations.notes: GA-responsive; from durum wheat cv Icaro

perturbations.evidence_sentence: Rht12 dwarf plants screened for tall suppressors; suppressors carry loss-of-function mutations in GA2oxidaseA13
Rht12, Rht18, and Rht14 share the same height-reducing mechanism
tall overgrowth individuals contain loss-of-function mutations in GA2oxidaseA13
perturbations.notes: Revertant to tall; loss of TaGA2oxA13 function
